charms.name: Charms
charms.description: The study of spells that alter objects without changing their fundamental nature.

potions.name: Potions
potions.description: The art of brewing magical mixtures with various effects.

defense-against-the-dark-arts.name: Defense Against the Dark Arts
defense-against-the-dark-arts.description: Defensive spells and counter-curses to protect against dark magic.

transfiguration.name: Transfiguration
transfiguration.description: The transformation of objects and beings into different forms.

herbology.name: Herbology
herbology.description: The study of magical plants and fungi and their properties.
